flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Franklin University fell 86% between 2021 and 2024 (21.1% → 2.9%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Franklin University fell 64% between 2021 and 2024 (100.0% → 35.9%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Franklin University rose 249% between 2006 and 2009 (11.1% → 38.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Franklin University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).
